subcodes.first_line: God grant that, in thy youth, thou mayest mention, praise, and serve the Cause of God. The world is passing with the swiftness of lightning
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله در جوانی بذکر و ثنا و خدمت امر الهی فائز شوی دنیا بمثابه برق در مرورست
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @goodly deeds; actions, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @the power of words; of speech, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
